Lark Funding Free $1K Account Deal

Lark Funding is giving traders a FREE $1,000 Instant funded account with every challenge purchase — no coupon code needed, as the bonus is applied automatically through the affiliate link above. This February bonus effectively adds a second funded account to your portfolio at zero additional cost, allowing you to run two simultaneous funded environments: your main challenge and a free $1K instant account where you can immediately begin generating real payouts.

Lark Funding is a Canadian proprietary trading firm recognized for its reliable operations, multi-model challenge structure, and strong trader support culture. The firm's Canadian base provides a level of operational credibility and financial stability that has made it popular among North American traders and international traders who value jurisdictional transparency. Lark Funding supports multiple evaluation models — pass-based and instant — giving traders flexibility in how they approach their funded journey.

With this free $1K Instant account bonus, you effectively get two things at once: your primary challenge at standard pricing, and a live $1K funded account that is activated immediately without any evaluation phase. The instant account can be used to generate payouts while you are still working through your main challenge, creating a dual-track approach to building your funded trading income. The multi-pass model support at Lark Funding also means you can hold multiple challenges across different program types simultaneously.

Lark Funding's trading conditions are built around clear, standardized rules across their program lineup. The firm supports a range of forex and CFD instruments, and their payout process has been consistently reviewed as reliable by the Canadian prop trading community. Instant accounts operate under standard risk rules, and funded traders receive payouts according to Lark Funding's verified processing schedule.

To claim this deal, use the affiliate link above to visit Lark Funding's challenge page. The free $1K Instant account will be automatically added to your order when you purchase any qualifying challenge — no code input is required. Purchase before the end of February 2026 to ensure eligibility for this specific bonus promotion.
